name: Key Lime Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lime juice and water in a medium saucepan; sprinkle with gelatin. Let stand for five minutes to soften.
2. Add sugar, eggs, and grated lime peel. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture just comes to a boil (7 to 8 minutes). Do not boil.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter and cream cheese at medium speed until well mixed (1 to 2 minutes). Gradually add hot lime mixture until well combined (1 to 2 minutes).
4. Refrigerate, stirring occasionally, until cool (about 45 minutes).
5. In a chilled small bowl, beat whipped cream at high speed until stiff peaks form (3 to 4 minutes). Fold into the lime mixture.
6. Pour into prepared crust. Cover; refrigerate until firm (3 to 4 hours).
7. Loosen side of cheesecake from pan by running knife around inside of pan. Cool completely.
8. Garnish top of cheesecake with whipped cream and lime slices.
